scripts.setup:web: mkdir -p src/vendor src/vendor/fonts && cp node_modules/angular/angular.min.js src/vendor/angular.min.js && cp node_modules/angular-route/angular-route.min.js src/vendor/angular-route.min.js && cp node_modules/material-design-icons-iconfont/dist/material-design-icons.css src/vendor/material-icons.css && cp node_modules/material-design-icons-iconfont/dist/fonts/* src/vendor/fonts/
scripts.build:raw: rm -rf www && mkdir www && cp -R src/* www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
